message:
feat(vdbe): wire OpenWrite through StorageCursor for Phase 5 B-tree write path (bd-3iw8)

Route both OpenRead and OpenWrite opcodes through StorageCursor backed by
BtCursor<MemPageStore>, enabling B-tree page-level writes alongside the
existing MemDatabase backend. Key changes:

- StorageCursor gains `writable` and `root_page` fields
- Rename storage_read_cursors_enabled → storage_cursors_enabled
- NewRowid: allocate from MemTable counter via StorageCursor root_page lookup
- Insert: B-tree table_insert with UPSERT semantics (move_to + delete + insert),
  dual-write to MemDatabase for Phase 5 transition consistency
- Delete: B-tree delete with MemDatabase sync via delete_by_rowid
- Add record_blob_bytes helper for extracting raw record bytes
- 4 new tests: openwrite routing, insert+readback, delete+sync, rowid allocation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
